title: filago lutescens subsp. atlantica
intro: Filago lutescens subsp. atlantica, also known as the yellow fleabane, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Filago lutescens subsp. atlantica include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
